generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraDepthDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor measuring speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraDepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CameraDepthDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data from speed sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data from steering angle sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object data from LiDAR and camera fusion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler, SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance ISO15622ACCLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38Enabler
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Python38Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for ACC processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance computation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for vehicle state and object track data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance Jetpack50SDKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for system integration and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService, ControlPanelService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization, saving, and reporting of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight, VehicleStateReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC processing offloaded to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC for operator intervention"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of environment for operator insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentVisualizationInsight
]

instance ControlPanelService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "User interaction control panel for Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPanelInsight
]

instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data for monitoring"
]

instance VehicleStateReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reporting of vehicle state data for troubleshooting"
]

instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of object tracks for operator insights"
]

instance EnvironmentVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and driving path"
]

instance ControlPanelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "User interface for system monitoring and control"
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic Cruise Control commands based on ISO 15622"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual override of ACC control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation via voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo control"
]

instance JetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna for communication"
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control"
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains JetsonNXAntenna, JetsonOrinNano, VedderElectronicSpeedController, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, MotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC-generated desired speed commands, emergency braking signals, and remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, adjust desired speed) from the Digital Twin Entity to the Physical Twin Entity for actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Network latency ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity, with clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms to ensure real-time coordination for safety-critical operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Four-tier architecture: Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (off-vehicle), User Entity (visualization/control), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), communicating via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase for ACC system monitoring and control; also applicable during design (cyber-physical experimentation) and validation phases for compliance testing."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity limited to performance class I ACC (no road curvature capabilities) due to 1/10-scale vehicle constraints; clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms due to hardware limitations; no explicit verification/validation methods detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-component communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; latency requirements based on 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V (≤100 ms)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle's NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity on separate hardware, though specific hosting details (e.g., cloud vs. edge) are not provided."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure; ISO 15622 for ACC control functionality; 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system implemented per ISO 15622; no specific cybersecurity measures detailed in the document."
]
